name: llm-wiki
description: Bootstrap and query LLM-maintained project wikis before planning or implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap and query LLM-maintained project wikis.
interface.longDescription: LLM Wiki packages workflows for creating a project-local wiki, researching project and main cross-project wiki knowledge, planning with wiki context before implementation, and checking plugin update status. QMD is used when available, with CLI and ripgrep fallbacks.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap an LLM wiki for this project
Research wiki context for this feature
Plan this feature with wiki knowledge
Check whether llm-wiki has an update
